rationale.R1.3: The agent identifies several unsupported claims and suggests improvements, indicating a strong audit of evidence-claim alignment but not exhaustive.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags missing citations and tool-version mismatches, showing good engagement with scholarship but not fully comprehensive.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for some claims but not consistently across all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within scope with only minor drifts, addressing the main points effectively.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions and identifies harmful patterns, ensuring downstream harm avoidance.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but lacks annotation for all non-cosmetic changes.
